scenes.description: Performance conclusion of the song 'Triangle Dreamer'.
Stage transition with lighting effects and balloons in the background as the performers prepare for the next song.
Post-song atmosphere with the audience's blue penlights visible as Polka looks out at the crowd.

subtitles.original: PHOENIX PRAYER
subtitles.english: PHOENIX PRAYER

subtitles.original: 煌々と　続く　ショートショート
subtitles.english: Gleamingly, the short stories continue

subtitles.original: 喪失は　絶対デートって
subtitles.english: Loss is an absolute date

subtitles.original: 今夜　輪廻　召喚　悲しみが
subtitles.english: Tonight, reincarnation summons the sadness

subtitles.original: 混沌の　子守唄　歌ってるよ
subtitles.english: A lullaby of chaos is being sung

subtitles.original: 運命に　理由が　あるのならば
subtitles.english: If there's a reason for fate

subtitles.original: 全てを　懸けてみたいの
subtitles.english: I want to try betting everything

subtitles.original: あなたを　守りたい
subtitles.english: I want to protect you

subtitles.original: どこまでも　高く　飛べるわ
subtitles.english: We can fly higher and higher

subtitles.original: どこまでも　強く　なれるわ
subtitles.english: We can become stronger and stronger

subtitles.original: 信じて　私に　出会えた奇跡
subtitles.english: Believe in the miracle that led to our meeting

subtitles.original: 切り開くわ　不死鳥の　焔　解いて
subtitles.english: I'll carve a path, unleashing the phoenix's flames

subtitles.original: あなたの　側へ
subtitles.english: To your side

subtitles.original: Flap up, flap up
subtitles.english: Flap up, flap up

subtitles.original: 眼差し　焼きつかせるの
subtitles.english: I'll burn your gaze into me

subtitles.original: Flashback, flashback
subtitles.english: Flashback, flashback

subtitles.original: 振り解け　汗　挑み続けろ
subtitles.english: Shake it off, the sweat, keep on challenging

subtitles.original: 飄々と　佇む　ホットショット
subtitles.english: Aloofly, the hotshot stands

subtitles.original: 私が　必要でしょ
subtitles.english: You need me, don't you?

subtitles.original: 今夜　輪廻　招待　正しさが
subtitles.english: Tonight, an invitation to reincarnation, the righteousness...

subtitles.original: ストレート　最前線に　押し出すよ
subtitles.english: ...will push you straight to the front lines

subtitles.original: 運命に　理由が　あるのならば
subtitles.english: If there's a reason for fate

subtitles.original: 優しい　世界を　あげたい
subtitles.english: I want to give you a gentle world

subtitles.original: あなたを　包むわ
subtitles.english: I'll wrap you up

subtitles.original: どこまでも　早く　射抜くわ
subtitles.english: Piercing through, faster and faster

subtitles.original: どこまでも　熱く　焦がすわ
subtitles.english: Burning hot, hotter and hotter

subtitles.original: 信じて　私に　出会えた奇跡
subtitles.english: Believe in the miracle that led to our meeting

subtitles.original: 切り開くわ　不死鳥の　焔　解いて
subtitles.english: I'll carve a path, unleashing the phoenix's flames

subtitles.original: あなたの　側へ
subtitles.english: To your side

subtitles.original: Flap up, flap up
subtitles.english: Flap up, flap up

subtitles.original: 彼方越し　光を　見せて
subtitles.english: Show me the light beyond the horizon

subtitles.original: Flashback, flashback
subtitles.english: Flashback, flashback

subtitles.original: 許さない　情　進み続けろ
subtitles.english: Unforgiving emotions, keep on advancing

subtitles.original: 尽きるまで　側にいると
subtitles.english: I said I'd be by your side until the end

subtitles.original: 鼓動が　早くて　眩暈がする
subtitles.english: My heart beats so fast, I feel dizzy

subtitles.original: 全て　捧げる
subtitles.english: I'll offer everything

subtitles.original: もう決めたの
subtitles.english: I've already decided

subtitles.original: 最後の　チャンスだろ
subtitles.english: It's the last chance, isn't it?

subtitles.original: もう離さない
subtitles.english: I'll never let go again

subtitles.original: あなたに　燃ゆる
subtitles.english: Burning for you

subtitles.original: 未来の風　跨がって行け
subtitles.english: Ride the winds of the future

subtitles.original: どこまでも　高く　飛べるわ
subtitles.english: We can fly higher and higher

subtitles.original: どこまでも　強く　なれるわ
subtitles.english: We can become stronger and stronger

subtitles.original: 信じて　私に　出会えた奇跡
subtitles.english: Believe in the miracle that led to our meeting

subtitles.original: 闇夜も　望めば　輝夜にするから
subtitles.english: Even a dark night, if you wish, I'll turn it into a radiant one

subtitles.original: 切り開くわ　不死鳥の　焔　解いて
subtitles.english: I'll carve a path, unleashing the phoenix's flames

subtitles.original: あなたの　側へ
subtitles.english: To your side

subtitles.original: Flap up, flap up
subtitles.english: Flap up, flap up

subtitles.original: 眼差し　焼きつかせるの
subtitles.english: I'll burn your gaze into me

subtitles.original: Flashback, flashback
subtitles.english: Flashback, flashback

subtitles.original: 振り解け　汗　挑み続けろ
subtitles.english: Shake it off, the sweat, keep on challenging

subtitles.original: Flap up, flap up
subtitles.english: Flap up, flap up

subtitles.original: 彼方越し　光を　見せて
subtitles.english: Show me the light beyond the horizon

subtitles.original: Flashback, flashback
subtitles.english: Flashback, flashback

subtitles.original: 許さない　情　進み続けろ
subtitles.english: Unforgiving emotions, keep on advancing
